channel.title: Pages on Aaron's Space
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Aaron's Space

item.title: My Projects
item.description: While most of my projects can be found on my Github, here is a complete list of the projects I have completed / am working on: Collection To Do Built with Django/Vue - A mobile app intended for use by myself and my wife. Showcasing the currently catchable achievements on Animal Crossing depending on the month of the year. Scrabble Stats Built with Django/Vue - A score keeping application built with Django and Vue.
